properties.tree_description: Tree 1 is a large pine that has been repeatedly dropping live large branches (see pictures), including limbs >10 feet in length. Also, concerned about tree competition with young maple (see comments).Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Tree 1 is within 20 feet of neighbors house and falling branches have already caused damage to her patio.  Worried beetles could also contribute to why so many branches are falling.  The patio is frequently occupied, creating ongoing concern for the safety of the neighboring resident and guests.
